meta.title: the diner, empty at the counter
meta.composer: field-tone for the Modern Mythology VN
meta.for: VN locale ambient bed · diner_interior · the world hum under the Music Player
meta.notes: What D'Ambrosio's sounds like when the jukebox is between records: a fluorescent tube's 60-cycle hum, the low drone of the walk-in cooler two rooms over, and once every loop a far, soft ring that could be the register or a spoon on ceramic. Sits WAY under whatever the Music Player is playing. 16 bars, 64 BPM, quiet.
